title: stevia vaga
intro: Stevia vaga, also known as Stevia rebaudiana, is a plant species native to South America that belongs to the sunflower family. The leaves of the Stevia vaga plant contain medicinal properties, including steviol glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as high blood pressure, diabetes, and inflammation. The health benefits of Stevia vaga include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Stevia vaga include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
